name: clickme
description: 클릭미 모노레포 개발 명령어 허브 (백엔드/프론트 실행·테스트·린트)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/backend && uv run uvicorn clickme.entrypoints.api.main:create_app --factory --reload --port 8000
scripts.worker: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m clickme.entrypoints.worker.main
scripts.test:arch: cd apps/backend && uv run pytest tests/architecture -v
scripts.lint: cd apps/backend && uv run ruff check . && cd ../web && npm run lint
scripts.fmt: cd apps/backend && uv run ruff format . && uv run ruff check . --fix
